differences.description: ASF variant names cveprocess.apache.org and ASF PMC membership; generic variant uses <cve-tool-url> placeholder and generic CNA language — platform-specific scope difference
ASF variant hardcodes the ASF CVE tool URL and LDAP login; generic variant uses <cve-tool-url> and <project-config> placeholder convention
ASF variant names the ASF PMC contact; generic variant uses <cna-contact> placeholder
ASF variant explains PMC vs committer allocation eligibility specific to ASF governance; generic variant defers to <project-config>/project.md for the CNA model
